summary: Frontend testing for Users page matrix view and SEMED dropdown features. All 10 test cases passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: ROLE_MATRIX constant correctly defines all 9 roles and 18 modules
SEMED dropdown correctly shows all 4 SEMED levels (semed, semed1, semed2, semed3)
Matrix panel toggle correctly hides 'Novo Usuário' button when active
Role select in user form correctly includes all SEMED variants for admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Users page matrix and SEMED dropdown features fully tested. Matrix shows 9 roles x 18 modules with correct access levels. SEMED quick change dropdown works for admin users.

matrix_button_visibility.test: 'Matriz de Permissões' button visible for admin

matrix_panel_display.test: Matrix panel shows when button clicked

semed_no_access_modules.test: SEMED shows '—' for Diário AEE, Dashboard Analítico, RH/Folha, Pré-Matrículas

semed_dropdown_visibility.test: SEMED dropdown appears for SEMED users

role_select_semed_options.test: Role select includes semed1 and semed2 for admin

novo_usuario_hidden_in_matrix.test: 'Novo Usuário' button hidden when matrix tab active
